$schema-comment: Annotation file for `bun check deps-audit --verbose`. Each entry maps a package name (matching package.json keys) to a short note explaining what the dep is used for in this codebase. Missing entries trigger a warning in verbose mode. Keep notes one line each.

notes.@automerge/automerge: CRDT core used by the peer/mesh modules for conflict-free shared state.
notes.@automerge/automerge-repo: Repository layer over Automerge — manages document identity, sync, and persistence.
notes.@automerge/automerge-repo-network-websoc: WebSocket transport for automerge-repo — used by mesh-node and the peer.ts client.
notes.@automerge/automerge-repo-storage-indexe: Browser-side persistent storage adapter for automerge-repo (IndexedDB).
notes.@automerge/automerge-repo-storage-nodefs: Node-side persistent storage adapter for automerge-repo (filesystem).
notes.@biomejs/biome: Linter and formatter — replaces ESLint + Prettier. Run via `bun run lint`.
notes.@elysiajs/cors: CORS plugin for example Elysia servers (server/server.ts examples).
notes.@elysiajs/eden: Type-safe RPC client generator from Elysia routes — used by polly's elysia integration and example clients.
notes.@elysiajs/html: HTML response helper for Elysia servers used in example apps.
notes.@preact/signals: Reactive signals — the state primitive across polly's UI and shared state layers.
notes.@preact/signals-core: Lower-level signals package — used by the Elysia server integration where DOM bindings aren't needed.
notes.@roamhq/wrtc: Native WebRTC binding for node — required by the mesh module's node-side peer connections.
notes.@types/bun: TypeScript types for Bun runtime APIs.
notes.@types/chrome: TypeScript types for Chrome extension APIs (used by the popup/content/background entry points).
notes.@types/node: TypeScript types for Node-compatible APIs in test packages.
notes.@types/pixelmatch: Types for pixelmatch — used by the visual-test tool.
notes.@types/pngjs: Types for pngjs — used by the visual-test tool.
notes.@types/serialize-javascript: Types for serialize-javascript — used to serialise function predicates in $constraints.
notes.@types/ws: Types for the ws package — used by the mesh-node websocket peer.
notes.dompurify: HTML sanitiser used by the polly-ui markdown renderer.
notes.elysia: HTTP server framework — used by the optional elysia integration and example servers.
notes.fast-check: Property-based testing library used by the verify tool's TLA+ codegen fuzzer.
notes.marked: Markdown parser used by the polly-ui markdown component.
notes.pixelmatch: Per-pixel image diff used by the visual-test tool.
notes.pngjs: PNG decoder used by the visual-test tool to load screenshots before pixelmatch.
notes.preact: React-compatible UI runtime — small bundle, used by the popup/devtools/options entry points.
notes.preact-render-to-string: Server-side rendering for example Elysia clients.
notes.puppeteer: Headless Chrome driver — used by the e2e visualize verification script and browser tests.
notes.serialize-javascript: Serialises functions/regex/Date for round-tripping $constraints predicates between code and TLA+ output.
notes.ts-morph: TypeScript AST library used by tools/analysis to extract handlers, contexts, flows, types, and integrations.
notes.tweetnacl: Ed25519 / box crypto primitives used by the peer authentication layer.
notes.typescript: TypeScript compiler — used for type-checking and declaration generation.
notes.werift: Pure-TS WebRTC implementation — node alternative to @roamhq/wrtc, used in environments where the native binding is unavailable.
notes.ws: WebSocket server/client used by mesh-node for cross-device sync.
